{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Swarm-Queen Esh’kinaar's carapace
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Relics of the [[Swarm-Queen]] [[Esh’kinaar]] include crossed [[scythe]]-like spines, one black and one rainbow colored.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
